name: Tsubaki the Tidebound
dialogue: Water outlasts stone. Ice outlasts fire. Mist outlasts sight.
Can your team survive a war of attrition?
preBattleLine: Tsubaki draws a circle in the air. Frost crawls across the mat.
postDefeatDialogue: Tsubaki bows. The frost melts to nothing.
You weathered the storm. Kaen burns in the east wing — his focus is absolute.
